case_title: ROMAN MILANOFF VS. TOTAL AIRPORT SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,250.00 FILED BY MILANOFF, ROMAN AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAL AIRPORT SERVICES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOTAL AIRPORT SERVICES INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE $45.00 - HENRY THOMAS SERVED SEP-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAL AIRPORT SERVICES INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE PAID $55.00 - GENE GREGG SERVED SEP-10-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAL AIRPORT SERVICES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARLENA LINTON--DIRECTOR OF HUMAN SERVICES AND HELENA PINTAU--ADMINISTRATIVE ASSISTANT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILANOFF, ROMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOTAL AIRPORT SERVICES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2014 - JUDGMENT.
